title: olea aquifolium var. ilicifolia
intro: Olea aquifolium var. ilicifolia, also known as Holly-leafed Olive, is a lesser-known variety of the olive tree (Olea europaea) with distinctive holly-like leaves. The medicinal properties of Olea aquifolium var. ilicifolia include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Olea aquifolium var. ilicifolia may include infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
